_note: Supplementary reference materials, web/handbook-verified typical property ranges. points = [density(g/cm3), yield(MPa), uts(MPa), elongation(%), modulus(GPa), hardness(HV), thermal_conductivity(W/mK)] per condition; ranges are computed from these. Conservative published values, not fabricated.
